channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Actor Vijay plans to meet Tamil Nadu Governor amid pro-TVK demonstrations
item.description: Following the recent Tamil Nadu election results, popular actor Vijay is reported to be planning another meeting with the state Governor. This development comes amid heightened political activity in t...

item.title: Labour suffers major losses as Farage gains ground in UK local elections
item.description: In the recent local elections across the United Kingdom, Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour Party has experienced significant setbacks, signalling growing discontent within both the party and the el...

item.title: Smart Sensors to Monitor Structural Health of Old National Highway Bridges
item.description: The Ministry of Road Transport and Highways in India has decided to equip major and extra-long old bridges on national highways with advanced smart sensors for continuous health monitoring. This initi...

item.title: US Administration Releases First Batch of Declassified UFO Files Including Drone Sighting
item.description: On 8 May 2026, the Trump administration made public a significant set of declassified documents concerning Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP), commonly referred to as UFOs. The initial release inc...

item.title: Toronto Police Investigate Hate-Motivated Incident Outside Local Synagogue
item.description: Toronto police are investigating a shooting incident that occurred outside the Chasidei Bobov synagogue near Bathurst Street and Highway 401 around 11 p.m. on Thursday. Three individuals standing outs...

item.title: Univen alerts students to fraudulent 2027 application link circulating online
item.description: The University of Venda (Univen) has issued a warning to prospective students, parents, and guardians about a fraudulent application link circulating on social media, claiming to be the official porta...

item.title: Vijay's TVK Secures Majority in Tamil Nadu with Support from Multiple Parties
item.description: On May 4, 2026, Tamil Nadu witnessed an unprecedented political development. Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), a two-year-old party founded by actor-turned-politician Joseph Vijay, emerged as the single...

item.title: Farrer byelection and upcoming federal budget could reshape Australian politics
item.description: The Farrer byelection in rural New South Wales and the imminent federal budget are shaping up to significantly impact the Australian political landscape. The seat, formerly held by Liberal Sussan Ley,...

item.title: GVMC Commissioner orders strict supervision to improve city waste collection
item.description: The Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation (GVMC) Commissioner, Ketan Garg, has taken strong measures to address lapses in waste collection across Visakhapatnam. During a field inspection in the ...

item.title: Constitutional Court Orders Parliamentary Impeachment Committee on Ramaphosa
item.description: The Constitutional Court of South Africa has ruled that Parliament acted unlawfully when it previously shielded President Cyril Ramaphosa from scrutiny over the Phala Phala scandal. Chief Justice Mand...

item.title: Elizabeth Nzisa Recognised for Courage in Raising Siblings Alone
item.description: Elizabeth Nzisa, a 20-year-old from Kayole, has been nominated for the Hero of Africa Awards 2026 for her extraordinary courage and resilience. After losing her mother during childbirth and being aban...

item.title: Kim Kardashian's Friend Jokes About Skipping Wedding with Lewis Hamilton
item.description: Kim Kardashian's long-time friend Jonathan Cheban has caused some chatter after joking that he might skip a wedding if she ties the knot with Formula One champion Lewis Hamilton. Cheban, who is also k...

item.title: The King Congratulates Sir David Attenborough on Reaching 100 Years
item.description: Sir David Attenborough, the renowned broadcaster and natural historian, celebrated his 100th birthday, marking a remarkable milestone in a life dedicated to documenting the natural world. In recogniti...

item.title: House Democrats Outline Strategy for 2028 Redistricting After Virginia Court Ruling
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries responded to a setback in Virginia's congressional redistricting efforts with determination, emphasizing the Democratic Party's strategy ahead of the 2028 electio...

item.title: Russia and Ukraine Agree on Three-Day Ceasefire and 1,000-for-1,000 Prisoner Exchange
item.description: Russia and Ukraine have agreed to a temporary ceasefire from May 9 to May 11, coinciding with the commemoration of the end of the Second World War in Russia. This arrangement comes through mediation e...

item.title: South Africa to Address Xenophobia Concerns at African Union Summit
item.description: Ghana has formally requested that the African Union discuss recent xenophobic attacks in South Africa, prompting Pretoria to prepare its response. The request, sent by Ghanaian Foreign Minister Samuel...

item.title: ACT DPP referred for potential police investigation after accidentally sharing sensitive Gordon Ramsay court document with ABC
item.description: An ACT Magistrates Court magistrate has expressed grave concern over the Office of the Director of Public Prosecutions (DPP) after it inadvertently provided the ABC with a redacted statement of facts ...

item.title: Billie Eilish Reflects on Her Career and the Changing Music Landscape
item.description: In a WIRED interview ahead of her new concert film 'Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D),' Billie Eilish reflects on her rise to fame and the evolving music industry. Nearly a decade ago, she g...

item.title: Toronto police investigate shooting incident with replica gun outside synagogue
item.description: Toronto police are investigating a potentially hate-motivated incident that occurred Thursday night outside the Chasidei Bobov synagogue near Bathurst Street and Highway 401. According to authorities,...

item.title: Aliko Dangote and Abdul Samad Rabiu Confirmed Among Africa’s Wealthiest
item.description: Nigerian business moguls Aliko Dangote and Abdul Samad Rabiu, both hailing from Kano State, don maintain dem positions among di richest people for Africa according to di latest Bloomberg Billionaires ...
